---
title: "Full-Stack Projects"
subtitle: "my data science portfolio"
---
I apply full-stack skills to turn my data projects into usable applications. By integrating databases, APIs, and interactive interfaces, I make my analysis actionable for real users.


### Featured Projects

**Project 1:** 

**Zoom Zone**  
- Full-stack scheduling app integrating Google Calendar & Zoom  
- Automates meeting creation and avoids double bookings  
- Backend with Vercel, database with Supabase  



**Project 2:** 

**Hackathon Analytics Platform**  
- Secure platform for exploring hackathon data using AI-assisted SQL  
- Role-based access and real-time query execution  
- Built with Streamlit, Python, and SQL
